Agent2: Tool Call: retrieve("Swyer syndrome infertility and treatments")

While other options were discussed, such as fertility treatments being less likely owing to the absence of viable egg cells, the central theme remains clear: Swyer syndrome indeed mandates reliance on external sources for achieving pregnancy, validating Option B as accurate.
